meta.caveat: Hand-seeded TTP catalogue + keyword search against procurement signal. Absence of keyword evidence is not absence of capability - some defensive programs are classified or use idiosyncratic naming. Use this as a TRIAGE artifact: the high-gap TTPs deserve a closer look, not a 'we have no defense' conclusion. Future enhancement: extract TTPs from doctrine chunks via LLM and merge with this catalogue.
